# Karthikeyan K — AI Engineer

> Portfolio of Karthikeyan K, an AI Engineer building multi-agent LLM systems, RAG pipelines, and intelligent automation. Currently Associate Data Analyst at Zinnov, designing agentic AI workflows for enterprise data automation.

## Who is Karthikeyan K

Karthikeyan K is an AI Engineer from Chennai, India, focused on agentic AI: systems where LLMs don't just answer questions but take multi-step actions, retrieve context intelligently, and integrate into real business workflows. He works primarily in Python with hands-on experience across LangChain, LangGraph, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), Model Context Protocol (MCP), and vector-based retrieval systems.

At Zinnov (Associate Data Analyst, September 2025–present) he:
- Designed and deployed LLM role-mapping agents (LangChain, LangGraph, Gemini API) that automate enterprise role classification for Fortune 500 clients, cutting manual classification effort by ~90%
- Built a RAG + embeddings entity-resolution system that reconciles 1.6M+ company records at ~90% match accuracy
- Architects multi-agent AI workflows that automate complex business processes

Education: B.Tech in Information Technology, DMI College of Engineering (2021–2025). Six internships across AI, full-stack, UI, and IoT (Zinnov, MarcelloTech, OctaNet, NoviTech R&D, Anna University MIT Campus, Sri Sairam Techno Incubator).

Publication: "AI-Driven Consulting: A Smart Expert System for Diverse Domains" (international research paper). Also presented research on deep learning for skin disease diagnosis.

## Core Expertise

- Agentic AI and multi-agent systems: LangChain, LangGraph, MCP, AI agents, orchestration
- Retrieval-Augmented Generation: vector databases, embedding models, semantic search, entity resolution
- LLM engineering: prompt engineering, Gemini API, evaluation, AI automation
- ML and NLP: deep learning, named-entity recognition (SpaCy), scikit-learn, Hugging Face
- Engineering foundation: Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Next.js, full-stack deployment

## Featured AI Projects

### AI Consulting System — multi-domain LLM expert system
- Specialized Gemini 2.0 Flash agents for Education, Healthcare, Finance and Retail with domain-tuned prompting and real-time persistence; basis of the published research paper
- Case study: https://karthikeyank-site.vercel.app/projects/ai-consulting.html
- Live: https://aiconsultingsystem.netlify.app/ · Code: https://github.com/Karthikeyan260/AiConsultingSystem

### AI Job Application Assistant — LLM career copilot
- Resume optimization, cover-letter generation and job-fit scoring via Gemini 2.0 Flash with ML-driven skill-gap analysis
- Case study: https://karthikeyank-site.vercel.app/projects/job-assistant.html
- Live: https://ai-powered-job-application-assistant.streamlit.app/ · Code: https://github.com/Karthikeyan260/AI-Powered-Job-Application-Assistant

### NutrifyAI — vision-language nutrition analysis
- Food photos become instant nutritional insight through Gemini multimodal inference
- Case study: https://karthikeyank-site.vercel.app/projects/nutrify-ai.html
- Live: https://nutrifyai.streamlit.app/ · Code: https://github.com/Karthikeyan260/NutriLens

### Address NER — custom named-entity recognition
- Custom SpaCy NER model extracting structured address components at 92% F1, deployed on Hugging Face Spaces
- Case study: https://karthikeyank-site.vercel.app/projects/address-ner.html
- Live: https://huggingface.co/spaces/karthik2604/Address_ner · Code: https://github.com/Karthikeyan260/Address_NER

### Other builds
- Todo Application (React/TypeScript/Redux): https://i8ftfb0ekpv7admu.vercel.app/
- Weather Dashboard (real-time API dashboard): https://weather-dashboard-rho-inky.vercel.app/
- Text to Speech (Web Speech API): https://text-to-speech-webpage.vercel.app
- Chess with minimax AI, Snake, Memory Game, Tic Tac Toe, Netflix UI clone — see https://github.com/Karthikeyan260

## Certifications

20+ including Claude Certified Architect – Foundations (Anthropic, verified on Credly), Building with the Claude API, Claude Code in Action, Introduction to Model Context Protocol (Anthropic), AI Agents 101 with MCP (AMD AI Academy), AI Agents Fundamentals (Hugging Face), Introduction to Generative AI and Responsible AI (Google Cloud).
